product: Customer-managed keys for Unity Catalog are generally available
tagline: Customer managed keys (CMK) for Unity Catalog are now generally available.
what_it_does: Customer managed keys (CMK) for Unity Catalog are now generally available. Use your own cloud KMS keys to encrypt data in Unity Catalog catalogs backed by default storage. note This feature requires the Enterprise tier.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Customer managed keys (CMK) for Unity Catalog are now generally available.
